name: Chicken-Broccoli Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 package (10 oz) frozen chopped broccoli, thawed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Mix 2 cups of the cheese, chicken, onion, and broccoli in a greased pie plate (10 x 1 1/2").
3. Beat the remaining ingredients except cheese with a wire whisk or hand beater until almost smooth, about 1 minute.
4. Pour the mixture into the plate.
5. Bake until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean, approximately 25 to 30 minutes.
6. Top with the remaining cheese.
7. Bake just until melted, for an additional 1 or 2 minutes.
8. Allow to cool for 5 minutes before serving. Serves 6 to 8.
